title: Gangster Lyrics Billa 2 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Gangster
Singers: Yuvan and Stefny
Movie: Billa 2
Lyrics : Na MuthuKumar
Music : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster you will surrender

Thannai thaane sedhukiyavan ivan
vidhi irutinil kirukiyavan ivan
Vazhvil ellam odhukiyavan ivan
vali-yil inbam thediyavan

Don don don, miralum don don
don-ku kellam don, indha billa dan
Don don don..adhirum don don
singathin veri indha billa dan

Give your way, your way to this gangster
Give your way..your way to this monster
Give your way, your way to this gangster

Erimalai meleri kodi kattuvaan
ivan ezhundhadhum ellorum kai kattuvaan
Engegengo mugam kaatuvaan
Ivan yemanuke theriyamal bayam kaatuvaan

Don don don, miralum don don
don-ku kellam don, indha billa dhan
Don don don..adhirum don don
singathin veri indha billa dhan

Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster you will surrender

David billa billa billa
here david billa is the monster
drop drop drop drop the beat..

Don don don..Fear so strong
if you stand in his way
you will not live for long
Don don don..his power so strong
So of his game..he is never wrong

Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster here comes the monster
Gang gang gangster you will surrender

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Gangster'?

The song 'Gangster' conveys themes of power and dominance, reflecting the character's journey in the movie.

How does 'Gangster' fit into the plot of Billa 2?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in Billa 2, highlighting the protagonist's rise in the criminal world.

Who are the singers of 'Gangster'?

The song features vocals by Yuvan Shankar Raja and Stefny.

Who composed the music for 'Gangster'?

The music for 'Gangster' was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique style and energetic compositions.

When was 'Gangster' released?

'Gangster' was released on April 28, 2012, as part of the Billa 2 soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Gangster' from the movie Billa 2 is a high-energy track that encapsulates the fierce spirit of the protagonist. With its catchy beats and powerful lyrics, it sets the tone for the thrilling narrative of the film. The collaboration between Yuvan Shankar Raja and Stefny brings a unique flavor to the song, making it a perfect fit for party and celebration occasions. The lyrics reflect themes of strength and dominance, evoking a sense of excitement and empowerment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Gangster from Billa 2 is an electrifying anthem that showcases the dynamic collaboration between Yuvan Shankar Raja and Stefny. With its pulsating beats and catchy lyrics, this track perfectly captures the essence of a thrilling underworld saga. Get ready to surrender to the rhythm and energy of this unforgettable song!
stanzaMeanings: Gang gang gangster here comes the monster Gang gang gangster you will surrender
He built himself up, he scribbled his fate, he adjusted everything in life, he searched for happiness in his path.
Don don don, the trembling don, for all dons, this is the Billa Don don don, the roaring don, the lion's rage, this is the Billa
Give your way, your way to this gangster Give your way, your way to this monster Give your way, your way to this gangster
He will climb the volcano and plant a flag, when he rises, everyone will salute him. He will show his face everywhere, he will show fear even to the god of death.
